title: lycianthes stephanocalyx
intro: Lycianthes stephanocalyx, also known as Blue Potato Bush or Blue Potato Flower, is a flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lycianthes stephanocalyx include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lycianthes stephanocalyx include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
